ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "newspaper" TEXT /* Name of the newspaper that published the article */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type (e.g., cultural, music, sports) */,
  "focus" TEXT /* Focus of the event (e.g., regional, national, local) */,
  "highlighted_quote" TEXT /* Highlighted quote from the newspaper article */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the event takes place */,
  "expected_attendance" INTEGER /* Expected number of attendees */,
  "actual_attendance" INTEGER /* Actual number of attendees */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., cultural, music, sports) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the event type (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic impact entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "revenue_generated" REAL /* Revenue generated by the event */,
  "jobs_created" INTEGER /* Number of jobs created by the event */,
  "tourism_impact" REAL /* Impact on tourism (e.g., number of visitors, revenue generated) */,
  "hotel_bookings" INTEGER /* Number of hotel bookings */,
  "local_spending" REAL /* Local spending by attendees */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic data (e.g., survey, report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_impact_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media coverage entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "newspaper" TEXT /* Name of the newspaper that published the article */,
  "article_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "article_text" TEXT /* Text of the article */,
  "article_url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "social_media_post_id" TEXT /* ID of the social media post */,
  "social_media_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the social media post was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_coverage_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the event organizer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the event organizer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the event organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_coverage" (
  "post_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the post was published (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was published */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the post */,
  "post_url" TEXT /* URL of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_coverage_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
